_comment: Copy this file to ~/pet-portraits/incoming/<batch-name>/manifest.json next to your Codex outputs, fill in items, then run: bun scripts/library/ingest.ts ~/pet-portraits/incoming/<batch-name>

items.prompt: Watercolour-floral pet portrait of a golden retriever, soft pastel hues, botanical wreath frame, museum-grade detail, suitable for canvas print, sRGB, square aspect 1:1.
Vintage western cowboy wanted-poster of a miniature dachshund named Milo, faded sepia tones, hand-stamped serif typography, distressed paper texture, museum-grade detail, sRGB, square aspect 1:1.

items.home_setting: narrow entryway with shoes and coats
items.pet_action: being held up with paws dangling
items.prompt: Casual Android phone photo, vertical 9:16, taken by a real customer in a lived-in home. A cream French bulldog puppy named Biscuit is being held up beside a small square canvas on the wall. The canvas shows the same puppy as a soft hand-painted watercolour portrait with the name 'Biscuit' at the bottom. Cozy hallway background with normal home details: shoes near the door, textured wall, soft daylight from a nearby window. Slight imperfect framing, mild phone-camera noise. Make it look like a genuine customer photo.
